text: Kal raat Papa se bahas hui kyunki ladke walon ne meri beti ko apnane se mana kar diya aur ek aur rishta toot gaya. Main subah se itna ro rahi hoon ki dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai aur samajh nahi aa raha bacchi ko school kaise bheju. Mujhe lag raha hai meri zindagi bas ek kalank ban gayi hai aur is flood of emotions mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha.

Raat ko taya ji ne taana mara ki divorcee hone ki wajah se bina bhari dowry ke koi kacha rishta bhi nahi aayega, aur behas bina kisi nateeje ke khatam hui. Main itni ghabrahat aur sharam mein doobi hoon ki subah se ek jagah baithi sisak rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Bas yehi ghoom raha hai ki 'log kya kahenge' ki pehla sasural ujda aur doosra bas nahi raha.

Kal raat Mummy ke sath bahut gandi bahas hui jab unhone kaha ki single mother ki kundali mein dosh dekh kar hi aache rishte wapas laut jate hain. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai aur office ke liye nikalne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Is waqt main aage ki aarthik tangee ya solution ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas aansoo nahi ruk rahe.

Raat ko rishtedaron ne phone par keh diya ki pichle sasural ki tarah is baar bhi meri hi galti hogi isliye kal ladke wale teesri baar reject karke gaye hain. Mujhe itna rona aa raha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai aur main apne bacche ke future ke baare mein kuch plan nahi kar pa rahi. Dimaag itna zyada thak gaya hai is community exclusion se ki ab kuch samajhne ki halat hi nahi bachi hai.

Kal raat ki ladaai mein chacha ne saaf keh diya ki single mother ko caste mismatch wale rishte hi milenge, koi samajhdar parivaar haath nahi lagayega. Mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya hai ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi, dimaag mein bas wahi taane goonj rahe hain. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, lagta hai jaise main is samajh ke liye ek bojh hoon.
